top_patterns.description: Open with a personal emotion or thought, often followed by reflection or a call to action.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: Most captions, especially those sharing feelings or experiences.
example_quotes: I am just so sad. And exhausted. And frustrated and truthfully, feeling totally powerless.
Because each day on this planet is a gift 🎁

top_patterns.description: State an observation, then invite engagement or action.
top_patterns.structure_template: What is going on [observation]. [Call to action or reflection].
top_patterns.when_it_appears: Often in posts about current events or social issues.
example_quotes: What is going on Mother Earth. It’s June 8th and we have snow and summit does not understand why ski school is not open today. :)
Thanks @griffinloop for 1 of 40 #launchintention sweatshirts. My intention is to practice radical acceptance in all areas of my life.

archetypal_structures.formula: Reflects on a personal experience or feeling + expresses hope or prayer for the future.
archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Connects personal growth with broader hopes or societal change.
example_quotes: My prayer is that I always balance the desire to expose my son to adventures but make him feel loved and fully accepted.
I pray that there will be compassion in the hearts of our representatives as they vote on HR-8.

archetypal_structures.formula: Expresses joy or pride + thanks or acknowledges others.
example_quotes: What a pleasure to share so much with @shrmofficial in Las Vegas today. I am leaving with a full heart.

closers: Let’s make sure our voices are heard
bridge_phrases: and to push him hard enough
language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences, often 10-20 words.
language_habits.line_break_style: Occasional line breaks for emphasis, especially after emotional or key points.

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Builds connection through vulnerability and personal insight.
example_quotes: I am just so sad. And exhausted. And frustrated and truthfully, feeling totally powerless.
My prayer is that I always balance the desire to expose my son to adventures but make him feel loved.
Deeply proud of @toms for taking this bold stand and demanding a safer America.

anti_patterns: Lack of personal voice or emotion
Ignoring current events or social issues

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake’s current Instagram voice is highly personal, emotionally expressive, and action-oriented, emphasizing social issues and personal growth.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift toward more direct social activism and emotional vulnerability, less formal or detached tone.
